Simorchip USB · Dyo D100
Dyo D100 · USB 3.2 Gen 1
Both
Ends.
兩頭，都對。

One body, two connectors. Type-C for the phone in your hand, Type-A for the laptop on the desk. No adapter. No cable. No cloud that won't sync at the worst possible moment.

一個身體，兩個接頭。Type-C 給你手上的手機，Type-A 給桌上的筆電。不用轉接、不用線、不用在最糟的時刻還在等雲端同步。

Whichever end the moment needs —
it's already there. 插哪台都對。
Type-C + Type-A 100MB/s USB 3.2 Gen 1 32GB – 256GB Gunmetal Alloy 5-Year Warranty
USB Type-Alaptops · desktops · PC
USB Type-Cphones · tablets · Mac
Crossing 01 — Both ends, no adapter
It Speaks
Both Sides.
它兩邊都通。

You shot it on your phone. The client only has a Windows laptop. Between those two facts there's usually a missing dongle, a wrong cable, or a cloud upload you're watching spin. Not here. One end is Type-C, the other is Type-A. You don't pick the right one — both are the right one.

你用手機拍的。客戶只有一台 Windows 筆電。這兩件事中間，平常卡著一個你沒帶的轉接頭、一條插反的線、一個你盯著轉圈圈的雲端上傳。這裡沒這回事。一頭 Type-C、一頭 Type-A，你不用選對的那個——兩個都是對的那個。

Swivel dual connector · USB Type-C + Type-A
No adapter · No cable · No cloud
USB-C
Type-C
Phone · Tablet · Mac
One drive · 一支
USB-A
Type-A
Laptop · Desktop · PC
Crossing 02 — The 6 a.m. transfer
Fast Enough
To Stop Waiting.
快到你不用再等。

It's 6 a.m. The meeting is at 8. The deck is heavy and the only window you have is right now. USB 3.2 Gen 1, up to 100MB/s read, 30MB/s write — the transfer finishes before the coffee does. You're not waiting on the drive. The drive is waiting on you.

早上六點，會議八點，檔案很重，而你唯一的空檔就是現在。USB 3.2 Gen 1，讀取最高 100MB/s、寫入 30MB/s——還沒喝完咖啡，東西就傳完了。不是你在等它，是它在等你。

USB 3.2 Gen 1
Read up to 100MB/s · Write up to 30MB/s
0
MB/s Read Speed
30
MB/s
Write
USB 3.2 Gen 1 · Plug-and-play
Crossing 03 — The one in your pocket
Not The Biggest.
The One You Have.
不是最大的，是你帶著的那個。

The biggest drive in the world is useless if it's at home in a drawer. This one is on your keychain. 32, 64, 128 or 256 gigabytes — enough for the deck, the shoot, the backup, and the thing you forgot you'd need until you needed it. Capacity you'll actually have on you beats capacity you left behind.

世界上最大的隨身碟，放在家裡抽屜裡也是零。這一支在你鑰匙圈上。32、64、128、256GB——夠裝那份簡報、那支片、那次備份，還有那個你需要時才想起來要帶的東西。真的在身上的容量，贏過留在家裡的容量。

32GB · 64GB · 128GB · 256GB
Four sizes · All pocket-sized
32
GB
64
GB
128
GB
256
GB
16 × 60 × 9 mm · fits the keychain, not the drawer
Crossing 04 — Two years on the same keychain
Built To Be
Forgotten About.
耐到你會忘了它在。

It's been clipped to your bag for two years. Dropped in gravel, sat on, knocked around the bottom of a drawer with the loose change. The gunmetal zinc alloy shell doesn't look brand new — because it's been used. But it works exactly the same as the day you got it. The lanyard hole means it's always on you, not lost in a pocket somewhere.

它在你包上掛了兩年。摔過碎石地、被坐過、跟零錢一起在抽屜底下被撞來撞去。槍灰鋅合金外殼看起來不像全新的——因為它真的被用過。但它跟你拿到那天一模一樣地運作。掛繩孔讓它永遠在你身上，不是丟在某個口袋裡。

Premium gunmetal zinc alloy housing
Integrated lanyard hole · Operating 0°C ~ 45°C
HousingGunmetal Zinc Alloy
Dimensions16 × 60 × 9 mm
CarryIntegrated Lanyard Hole
Operating0°C ~ 45°C
Crossing 05 — The part you never think about
It Just Works.
That's The Whole Trick.
它就是會動，這就是全部的把戲。

You'll never see the Yixin 3379 controller doing its job. You'll never watch ECC catch a flipped bit, or wear-leveling spread the writes so no single cell wears out early, or S.M.A.R.T. quietly checking the drive's own health. That's the point. The best storage is the storage you forget is even working.

你永遠不會看到 Yixin 3379 控制器在工作。你不會看到 ECC 抓住一個跳掉的位元、不會看到 wear-leveling 把寫入分散開來讓某個區塊不會先壞、不會看到 S.M.A.R.T. 默默檢查自己的健康。這就是重點。最好的儲存，是你忘了它在運作的那種。

Yixin 3379 controller · ECC error correction
Global wear-leveling & block management · S.M.A.R.T.
Yixin 3379
Stable controller, built for the long run
ECC
Catches errors before they reach you
Wear-Leveling
Spreads writes so nothing wears out early
S.M.A.R.T.
Quietly monitors its own health
NAND Flash
High-quality, long-term data retention
Crossing 06 — Five years is a long time to be sure
Five Years.
We Mean It.
五年。我們說真的。

Anyone can say "reliable." We put a number on it: five years. Not "up to," not "under lab conditions at 3 a.m." Five years — in your pocket, on your keychain, in the real world. RoHS 2.0 compliant. Fully USB 3.2 Gen 1 compliant. What's on the box is what you get.

誰都能說「可靠」。我們給它一個數字：五年。不是「最高可達」，不是「凌晨三點實驗室條件下」。五年——在你口袋裡、鑰匙圈上、真實世界裡。符合 RoHS 2.0，完全符合 USB 3.2 Gen 1 規範。包裝上寫的，就是你拿到的。

5-Year Limited Warranty
RoHS 2.0 · USB 3.2 Gen 1 compliant
5
Year Limited Warranty
No asterisks. No fine print.
沒有星號，沒有小字。

USB 3.2 Gen 1
About the name
Dyo.
兩個世界，一支就對。
Dyo
δύο
Greek for two — two connectors, two worlds, one drive.
台語
唸起來像「對」—— 對、沒錯、就是它。
D100
The model. 100 = read speed, in MB/s.
Plug it in. It's right.
插上去，就對。
Specifications
The Whole Truth.
Here Are The Numbers.
全部的真相，數字都在這。
ModelDyo D100
InterfaceUSB 3.2 Gen 1 · Dual connector (Type-C + Type-A)
Dimensions16 × 60 × 9 mm
Capacity32GB / 64GB / 128GB / 256GB
ControllerYixin 3379
Performance (MB/s)Read up to 100 / Write up to 30
Operating Temperature0°C ~ 45°C
Storage Temperature-10°C ~ 70°C
HousingPremium gunmetal zinc alloy · integrated lanyard hole
Data IntegrityECC · Global wear-leveling & block management · S.M.A.R.T.
FlashHigh-quality NAND Flash
CompatibilitySmartphones, Tablets, Laptops
CertificateRoHS 2.0 · USB 3.2 Gen 1 compliant
Product Warranty5-Year Limited Warranty
* All data secured from Simorchip's internal labs under specific testing conditions.
Accurate data may vary depending on the operating environment.
Both
Ends.
兩頭都對。
One drive for the phone in your hand and the laptop on the desk.
手上的手機，桌上的筆電，一支就對。
